product.name: Arox T2 WR
product.familyDescriptorPl: Tkaniny robocze funkcyjne — antystatyczne i hydrofobowe
product.categorySourceGroup: Polyester Woven Fabrics for Raincoats, Jackets and Coveralls
product.titleDescriptor: 100% Polyester High Visible Water Repellent Oxford Fabric

descriptions: 100% Polyester high visible, water repellent oxford fabric.
Arox T2 WR fabrics are used for outdoor jackets, trousers and bodywarmers.
100% Polyester High Visible Water Repellent Oxford Fabric
160 g/m², 100% Polyester High Visible, Chemical Resistant,1/1 Plain Woven Fabric
technicalParameters: Tensile Strength | Warp > 900N ; Weft > 700N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp > 25N ; Weft > 20N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1

evidence: functionIconLabels: EN 20471 (High Visible Orange) Test Report
matches.rationale: Explicit EN ISO 20471 certification, high-visibility jacket application, and safety jacket labeling directly support high-visibility apparel classification.

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Antistatic (EN 1149) and EMI properties are present but no explicit electrical utility or high-voltage use is stated.
Chemical resistance (EN 13034) is present but no explicit welding, foundry or metal-processing use is stated.
